seoTitle: Phoenix Park vs Piallaway — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Phoenix Park and Piallaway. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Phoenix Park vs Piallaway: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Phoenix Park and Piallaway.
heading: Phoenix Park vs Piallaway — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Phoenix Park, New South Wales and Piallaway, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Phoenix Park has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Piallaway (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Phoenix Park or Piallaway safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Phoenix Park has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Piallaway scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Phoenix Park scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Piallaway scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Phoenix Park or Piallaway?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Phoenix Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.23% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
